details.title: Ship It [Kenney Jam 2024]
details.description:
🎉Winning game for the 2024 Kenney Game Jam!🎉What do busy salarymen do on their time off? Play with toy boats of course!
Ship It is a puzzle game about clicking toy boats to make them move, merge and getting them through the goal posts.
----------------------------------------
Rules:
Boats will move in the direction they're facingTwo of the same will merge and level up You can destroy boats by colliding mismatching oneGet the correct type of boat through all the goals
You will fail if:
A boat hits the groundA boat leaves the screenIf the wrong boat passes through a goal
Hint:
The direction the boats merge will match the one that got hit
----------------------------------------
Controls:
[Left Click]: Move Boat[R]: Reset Level
[S]: Skip Level[ESC]: Quit 
----------------------------------------
Credits
created by /  matthew ostil (@matthewostil)
audio by /  dylan king (@xylvnking)

moreInfo.Rating: Rated 4.8 out of 5 stars(4 total ratings)
moreInfo.Author: Osteel

details.title: Spirtual Bond
details.description:
Our submission for the Kenny Jam 2024, in the theme of "Connection"
As you walk into the castle you hear this eerie yet kind voice asking for help. You see a ghostly figure appear explaining he needs your help to complete his unfinished business to finally leave this world in peace. 
Solve puzzles and help collect items as you navigate through the castle.
Play by yourself or with a friend. Ghost and player are connected to each other.
CONTROLS:
Ghost - Moves with mouse
Player - Moves with WASDMade byMrinmoyee Nandi - Game, Level, UI & Visual Design
Saurabh Sood - Gameplay, Programing, UI & AudioDownload the file
Unzip file
Run .exe

moreInfo.Rating: Rated 5.0 out of 5 stars(1 total ratings)

details.title: Nexify  🏆
details.description:
NEXIFY submission to the Kenney 2024 game jam for "connection" For some reason this one was a hard one for me but I knew it would be when I signed up. I mostly get my ideas from doing artwork, with the artwork already created I had to think of gameplay more then just beautiful artwork as Kenney has already provided that. I started and stopped three different times and didn't really have a solid idea until I landed on what I have now, which I am very happy with.

The idea is the connection between objects and trying to figure how how to get them all in place. Once you figure out what the interactable object is, the rest will follow that object around. You're goal is to figure out the connection between the objects and then connect them in order where they belong. Part of the fun is figuring out what exactly you are supposed to do.

Game Trailer


My goal was to keep it simple as I tend to over complicate my games to the point of never finishing them or thinking up things when I'm almost done that change the scope entirely, I'm really bad about that, I did have to fight that some with this game also.
Submitted are 10 levels that go up in difficulty a title screen and an ending of sorts, I don't think the game is overly hard, the last level is tough though. I can imagine a lot of ways to make really neat puzzles what what I have created and I'm excited to work on this more in the future.



All the numbers follow the number one box in order, figure out where they go :)

The idea came to me just messing around with Construct and exploring the different types of behaviors. 
I'm really excited that I actually came up with an idea, I think that is one of the best things about game jams is somethings you make something you never would have otherwise.

Was really cool participating in this game jam, I look forward to any and all feedback :) I wish everyone luck with their projects also thank you for playing!

Game Design - Rob Williams       Music - Jetdarc

Bonus Challenges
⬜ Single Pack   ⬜ Mouse Only

Updates
7|27|2024: 
Added touch controls for the ability to play on tablets and mobile ❤️
Made the final level slightly easier
7|27|2024: 

Fixed a bug with the first stage and added in some title screen extras 
9|08|2024: 

10 NEW LEVELS! These levels introduce new game mechanics I wanted to add in originally but didn't have the time to. With these new levels the challenge does increase. There is also a bonus for folks who can find it that adds in a little more depth and might show players where the future of this game could go, it will be a challenge to find it and you might have to think a tad outside the box, so keep your eyes open for things that might be out of the ordinary ;)

details.title: Spellbound Streetcar
details.description:
Drive an enchanted streetcar for the people of a busy city.
Pick up passengers and take them to their desired destination to acquire permanent upgrades. Collect coins to boost your speed and hearts to calm the peoples' patience
Created for #KenneyJam 2024.

details.title: Airplane Mode
details.description:
When a rogue gang of cursors severs your internet connection, only you can find out what's behind them and send them back where they belong!
Controls
Move - Mouse
Fire - Left Click (and hold)

Had the crazy idea to make a full game using only the cursor pack.  Unsurprisingly, it's a bit difficult to convey a storyline with one graphic pack and no text, but I tried my best!

Kenney Jam 2024 Entry
Theme: Connection
Bonus Challenges Attempted:
1. Single pack: Your game should only use a single asset pack
 
2. No text: Create a game that doesn't use any text at all
 
3. Mouse only: Your game should be fully controlled using only the mouse

CreditsGraphics: KenneyMusic: ThiSound, ScythuzSFX: DaydreamSound, Kenney
(If Browser version doesn't work, you can try the zip files, but I haven't tested those)Downloadable versions have not thoroughly been tested.  Try to use the web version if you're able to!

details.title: Rollerun
details.description:
Get the marble from the entrance to the exit with the squiggliest path possible - the longer the marble runs, the more points you get!
Created in ~48 hours for Kenney Jam 2024!
==
Controls:
Left Click: Build
Right Click: Erase
Q/E: Rotate Pieces
R/F: Raise/Lower Pieces

details.title: Power Plug Inc
details.description:
Power Plug Inc
Power Plug Inc is a minigame made for Kenney Jam 2024. The main goal of the game is to connect all the plugs on each stage.
There are few bugs I couldn't iron out before the jam ends, but they shouldn't break the game too much.
In case of any problems - you can check out Windows version for more stable experience.
Thanks for the visit, have fun playing!
Controls
Left Mouse Button - Grab a cable
Should also work on mobile devices, but I wasn't testing it on my mobile so there might be some issues related to camera zoom and touch controls.
Credits
Sprites and Audio - Kenney.nlEverything else - Lethian (Me)

details.title: The Arcade
details.description:
The Arcade is the story of a sister and brother rebuilding a lost connection by their shared passion: Games. 
It has 2 mini games the separated siblings play together while catching up with each other. Made for Kenney Jam 2024. All visuals assets (excluding fonts) are Kenney assets.
Gamepad is supported and recommended. This is a singleplayer game that you control only the girl.
Programming & Game Design
Ahmet Kamil Keles
Fonts
Jelle Roman, VCR OSD Mono
Musics
Caketown (Matthew Pablo)
Generic 8-bit JRPG (AVGVSTA)

details.title: Minecart Rails
details.description:
- for Kenney Jam 2024 -
Connect the rails and escape from the dungeon!
Controls
[W][A][S][D] or Game Pad: Move[Ctrl]([Cmd])+[Z]: Undo[Ctrl]([Cmd])+[Y]: Redo[ESC]: Menu
If keys are stuck, please use Firefox or Game pad:)
Connect the rails from the minecart to the exit door. Push the blocks with rails on them to move them.
If you get stuck, retry with the [Ctrl]+[Z] or [ESC] key.
Playing time : around 10 minutes.
12 Stages.
Use Assets

Characters and map chips and Audios and splash screen
Kenney. Tiny Dungeon

Fonts
Itou Hiroki. PixelMplusmaru_ki_ya. marukiya font

Add undo / redo.

details.title: Marblelous Connections
details.description:
Welcome to Marblelous Connections!
This is my entry for Kenney Jam 2024. The requisite of the jam is to only use Kenney art and the theme was "Connection". So in the game you have to set the correct connection between track segments to keep the marble going.
I used Kenney's Marble kit for game assets, and also some of Kenney's UI components.

Music from third parties is allowed, I used Ovani's Chiptune collection tracks.


How to play
The next connection in the track is always highlighted in green color.You can change that connection using A/D, arrow keys, or the on-screen buttons (mobile).Once the ball reaches a connection you can't change it anymore and the next connection becomes active.If you get stuck, just hit the reset button (you can also press T)

details.title: Disconnected
details.description: Step into the boots of a resourceful robot navigating a mysterious space station in Disconnected... Created for the  Kenney Jam 2024 in 48 hours, this game challenges you to traverse levels by connecting with cameras throughout the station. Each camera offers a unique perspective, altering how you view the world around you.Without giving too much spoilers there are some gameplay pictures on the right.Have fun! And stay connected!Controls:Keyboard:WASD: MovingE: InteractingSpace: JumpController:Left Stick: MovingX: InteractingA: JumpThis was made using: Unreal Engine, Kenney.nl assets

details.title: TurboCharge
details.description:
Try your time at the TurboCharge track! You'll have to race twice as fast and twice as much to keep up with your car and make sure it remains charged, while getting the fastest time!
Controls:
WASD / Left Stick and Triggers: Steer and accelerate car.Left Click: Move player towards mouse cursor.Right Stick: Move player towards directionRight Click / South Button: Jump with player.Q / Left Shoulder: Switch CameraR / Select: Reset Both CharactersESC / Start: Pause
Would love any feedback! And post your times :)(It appears the HTML one takes a while to load, might take a few minutes)
Made for Kenney Jam 2024, theme "Connection"
